---
title: "Tools"
page-layout: full
toc: false
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
    include-before-body: "/nav.html"
listing:
  - id: tools-listing
    contents: "../tools/**/*.qmd"
    type: grid
    sort: "title asc"
    fields: [image, title, description]
---

## Tools

::: {#tools-listing}
:::
